# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Cross-Account CI/CD Access with Organization-based Trust Policy

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx)
    AllowedPattern: 'o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID starting with 'o-'

  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Management/Root account ID of the organization
    AllowedPattern: '\d{12}'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid 12-digit AWS account ID

  CICDRoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: CrossAccountCICDRole
    Description: Name of the CI/CD IAM Role
    AllowedPattern: '[a-zA-Z0-9+=,.@\-_]+'
    MaxLength: 64

  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for additional security when assuming the role
    MinLength: 8
    NoEcho: true

  MaxSessionDurationSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 900
    MaxValue: 7200
    Description: Maximum session duration in seconds (15 min to 2 hours)

  Environment:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - production
    Default: dev
    Description: Deployment environment

  TrustedCICDAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: Comma-separated list of specific trusted CI/CD account IDs (12-digit AWS account IDs)

Conditions:
  IsProduction: !Equals [!Ref Environment, 'production']

Resources:
  CrossAccountCICDRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${CICDRoleName}-${Environment}'
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDurationSeconds
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowOrganizationAccountAssumption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
              StringLike:
                'aws:PrincipalArn':
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/cicd-*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/github-actions-*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/jenkins-*'
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref ExternalId
          - Sid: AllowSpecificTrustedAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ','
                - !Sub
                  - '${accounts}'
                  - accounts: !Join
                      - ','
                      - !Split
                        - ','
                        - !Join
                          - ','
                          - !Ref TrustedCICDAccountIds
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref ExternalId
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': !If [IsProduction, 'true', 'false']
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CrossAccountCICD
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  CICDDeploymentPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${CICDRoleName}-DeploymentPolicy-${Environment}'
      Description: Policy granting CI/CD deployment permissions
      Roles:
        - !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: CloudFormationAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:DeleteStack'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackResources'
              - 'cloudformation:GetTemplate'
              - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
              - 'cloudformation:ListStacks'
              - 'cloudformation:CreateChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:ExecuteChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:DeleteChangeSet'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:*:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${Environment}-*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:*:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/cicd-*'
          - Sid: S3ArtifactAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
              - 's3:DeleteObject'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Environment}-cicd-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${Environment}-cicd-artifacts-${AWS::AccountId}/*'
          - Sid: ECRAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
              - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
              - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
              - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
              - 'ecr:PutImage'
              - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
              - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
              - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
              - 'ecr:DescribeRepositories'
              - 'ecr:ListImages'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ecr:*:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/${Environment}-*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:RequestedRegion':
                  - 'us-east-1'
                  - 'us-west-2'
                  - 'eu-west-1'
          - Sid: ECRGetToken
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: LambdaDeployAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'
              - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration'
              - 'lambda:PublishVersion'
              - 'lambda:CreateAlias'
              - 'lambda:UpdateAlias'
              - 'lambda:GetFunction'
              - 'lambda:ListFunctions'
              - 'lambda:GetAlias'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:*:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${Environment}-*'
          - Sid: ECSDeployAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ecs:UpdateService'
              - 'ecs:DescribeServices'
              - 'ecs:DescribeTaskDefinition'
              - 'ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition'
              - 'ecs:DeregisterTaskDefinition'
              - 'ecs:ListTasks'
              - 'ecs:DescribeTasks'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:RequestedRegion':
                  - 'us-east-1'
                  - 'us-west-2'
                  - 'eu-west-1'
          - Sid: IAMPassRole
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'iam:PassRole'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${Environment}-*-execution-role'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${Environment}-*-task-role'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'iam:PassedToService':
                  - 'lambda.amazonaws.com'
                  - 'ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com'
                  - 'cloudformation.amazonaws.com'

  CICDMonitoringPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${CICDRoleName}-MonitoringPolicy-${Environment}'
      Description: Policy for CI/CD monitoring and logging
      Roles:
        - !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: CloudWatchLogsAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
              - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
              - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
              - 'logs:DescribeLogGroups'
              - 'logs:DescribeLogStreams'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:logs:*:${AWS::AccountId}:log-group:/cicd/${Environment}/*'
          - Sid: SSMParameterReadAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'ssm:GetParameter'
              - 'ssm:GetParameters'
              - 'ssm:GetParametersByPath'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:*:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/cicd/${Environment}/*'
          - Sid: KMSDecryptAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService':
                  - !Sub 'ssm.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
                  - !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
          - Sid: STSGetCallerIdentity
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'sts:GetCallerIdentity'
            Resource: '*'

  DenyUnsafeActionsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${CICDRoleName}-DenyUnsafeActions-${Environment}'
      Description: Explicit deny policy to prevent dangerous operations
      Roles:
        - !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyIAMUserManagement
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:CreateUser'
              - 'iam:DeleteUser'
              - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
              - 'iam:CreateLoginProfile'
              - 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'
              - 'iam:PutUserPolicy'
              - 'iam:AddUserToGroup'
              - 'iam:DeleteRole'
              - 'iam:DeleteRolePolicy'
              - 'iam:DetachRolePolicy'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyOrganizationsAccess
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'organizations:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyAccountModification
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'account:*'
              - 'billing:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyCloudTrailModification
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'cloudtrail:DeleteTrail'
              - 'cloudtrail:StopLogging'
              - 'cloudtrail:UpdateTrail'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyVPCModification
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'ec2:CreateVpc'
              - 'ec2:DeleteVpc'
              - 'ec2:ModifyVpcAttribute'
              - 'ec2:CreateSubnet'
              - 'ec2:DeleteSubnet'
              - 'ec2:CreateInternetGateway'
              - 'ec2:DeleteInternetGateway'
              - 'ec2:CreateNatGateway'
              - 'ec2:DeleteNatGateway'
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Cross-Account CI/CD Role
    Value: !GetAtt CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'

  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the Cross-Account CI/CD Role
    Value: !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleName'

  AssumeRoleCommand:
    Description: AWS CLI command to assume this role
    Value: !Sub >
      aws sts assume-role
      --role-arn ${CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn}
      --role-session-name cicd-session
      --external-id <YOUR_EXTERNAL_ID>
      --duration-seconds ${MaxSessionDurationSeconds}

  TrustPolicyOrganizationId:
    Description: Organization ID used in the trust policy
    Value: !Ref OrganizationId
